第一次用quarto搭建网站来写blog与记录笔记，因为我手上有一个域名还没到期。qwq


了解到quarto还是因为想要有一个好的笔记系统来代替obsidian，现在切换到quarto + nvim 不知道怎么样。




::: {.cell layout-align="center"}

```{.r .cell-code}
library(ggplot2)
library(metR)

# 1. 创建网格数据，模拟稳态势流场 (Laplacian Potential Field)
# 模拟一个偶极子流场，它是拉普拉斯方程的一个经典解
grid <- expand.grid(x = seq(-2, 2, length.out = 40), 
                    y = seq(-2, 2, length.out = 40))

# 计算速度势 phi 和流函数 psi (基于算子性质)
grid$phi <- grid$x / (grid$x^2 + grid$y^2 + 0.5) 
# 计算速度分量 (梯度算子作用的结果)
grid$u <- ( (grid$y^2 + 0.5 - grid$x^2) / (grid$x^2 + grid$y^2 + 0.5)^2 )
grid$v <- ( -2 * grid$x * grid$y / (grid$x^2 + grid$y^2 + 0.5)^2 )

# 2. 绘图
ggplot(grid, aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  # 绘制等势线 (Equipotential lines)
  geom_contour(aes(z = phi, color = ..level..), bins = 20, size = 0.3) +
  # 绘制流线 (Streamlines)
  geom_streamline(aes(dx = u, dy = v), color = "#2c3e50", 
                  arrow.length = 0.4, alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "mako", guide = "none") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = expression(paste("Steady-State Potential Flow: ", nabla^2, phi == 0)),
    subtitle = "Visualizing the Laplace Operator in a Dipole Field",
    x = "x-axis", y = "y-axis"
  ) +
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Libertinus Serif"),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16)
  ) +
  coord_fixed()
```
